about.about_lpu_description: Lovely Professional University is a world-class institution dedicated to excellence in teaching, learning, and research. Founded with the vision of creating global leaders, LPU is today a symbol of innovation and academic brilliance to secure your future
about.our_vision_description: To be a premier academic institution, recognized internationally for its contribution to industry and society through excellence in teaching, learning, research, internationalization, entrepreneurship, and leadership.
about.our_mission_item1: To provide affordable quality education while maintaining high standards.
about.our_mission_item2: To nurture innovation and research-driven learning environment.
about.our_mission_item3: To develop holistic individuals capable of leading in a globalized world.

home.hero_description: Experience a world-class education at Lovely Professional University. With a 600-acre hi-tech campus, industry-aligned curriculum, and unmatched placement records, we prepare you for the global stage.
home.campus_description: Sprawled across 600 acres, our campus is a vibrant ecosystem of learning, innovation, and cultural diversity.
home.discover_passion_description: Choose from 200+ programs across various disciplines, designed to meet the demands of the modern industry.
home.why_lpu_item_1_description: Partnerships with 200+ foreign universities for exchange programs.
home.why_lpu_item_2_description: Top MNCs visit every year with record-breaking packages.
home.why_lpu_item_3_description: Dedicated research wings and innovation labs for students.
home.why_lpu_item_4_description: 300+ clubs and societies for extracurricular excellence.
home.ready_to_start_description: Join thousands of students from around the world and build a career you're proud of. Admissions are currently open for 2024-25.

footer.footer_university_description: India's largest university providing world-class education and transforming millions of lives through innovation and excellence.
footer.footer_address: Jalandhar - Delhi, G.T. Road, Phagwara, Punjab
footer.footer_copyright: 2026 Lovely Professional University. All rights reserved.
